name: Amass (Attack Surface Mapping)

auth.notes: Optional API keys for passive data sources (Shodan, Censys, VirusTotal, etc.)

performance.notes: Passive mode fast; active/brute enum can take hours

agent_readiness.notes: Comprehensive attack surface mapping and subdomain enumeration. amass enum -passive -d example.com. amass enum -active -d example.com -brute. 55+ passive sources (Shodan, Censys, VirusTotal, Wayback Machine, CT logs). amass intel -org 'Company Name' (ASN/CIDR discovery). amass db -list (view collected data). JSON/CSV output. Graph database for relationship tracking. OWASP project. The most thorough subdomain/ASN enumeration tool for bug bounty and red team recon.

gotchas: Very slow for active/brute enumeration modes
API keys dramatically improve passive result quality
v4 has breaking changes from v3 (different config format)
Resource intensive for large orgs with many subdomains
best_when: Red team external attack surface mapping
Organization ASN and IP range discovery
Comprehensive subdomain enumeration for large targets
avoid_when: Quick subdomain discovery (subfinder faster for passive-only)
When scope is small and gobuster DNS suffices
summary: Amass is OWASP's most comprehensive attack surface mapping tool. 55+ passive sources, active DNS brute-forcing, ASN/CIDR organization discovery, graph relationship tracking. API keys (Shodan/Censys/VirusTotal) dramatically improve results. amass enum -passive -d target.com. Standard for bug bounty recon and red team external mapping. Slower but more thorough than subfinder.
